title: OpenClinXR agent factory workflow reference
permitted_uses: Supports repo-native agent workflow patterns: charters, memory indexes, scorecards, source ledgers, and leadership review.
Supports adapting the workflow shape to Multiverse without copying OpenClinXR clinical/XR-specific roles.
claims_supported: OpenClinXR uses machine-readable agent artifacts and validation scripts as part of its planning workflow.
OpenClinXR separates coordinator, core, adversarial, and leadership review layers.
claims_not_supported: OpenClinXR business-domain roles are appropriate for Multiverse unchanged.
OpenClinXR product implementation choices should be copied into Multiverse.
